backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types (users, scholarships, applications) and CRUD endpoints for a scholarship management system with role-based access control via MixinAuthorization and AccessControl mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (dashboard, profile meter, skill gap, scholarship search, etc.) to their source files, component dependencies, and test IDs with confidence ratings.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON document summarizing each frontend source file's purpose and notable changes, such as Tailwind v3 compliance fixes and React hooks corrections.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS entry point importing Tailwind directives and defining OKLCH-based CSS custom property color tokens for light and dark themes including sidebar and chart colors.
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML shell for the React SPA, setting the page title to 'Scholarship Management & Career Roadmap' and mounting the app at the #root div.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that defines the TanStack Router route tree with public (login, help) and protected (dashboard, scholarships, resume builder, documents, profile, applications) routes, wrapped in ThemeProvider.
frontend/src/components/ChatbotWidget.ts: Floating chatbot widget that matches user input against a JSON knowledge base, displays a scrollable message history, and links to relevant pages; falls back to the help page for unrecognized queries.
Provides the main dashboard shell with a responsive sidebar navigation, user avatar, logout functionality, and a language toggle. Renders nav items with active-state highlighting using TanStack Router.
frontend/src/components/DocumentChecklis: Displays a checklist of required documents for a scholarship, showing upload status for each and allowing users to upload missing files which are saved to their profile.
frontend/src/components/LanguageToggle.t: A small button component that toggles the app language between English and Hindi using the translation hook.
frontend/src/components/ProfileCompletio: Renders an SVG circular progress meter showing profile completion percentage with color-coded states and a tooltip listing missing profile items.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetupModa: A modal dialog that collects basic user profile information (name, email, DOB, gender, category) on first login and saves it via the profile mutation hook.
Displays a single scholarship's details (title, provider, deadline, category, description) in a card with an eligibility badge and an apply button.
frontend/src/components/SkillGapAnalysis: Shows a two-column comparison of the user's current skills versus a scholarship's required skills, highlighting missing skills based on eligibility check results.
frontend/src/components/SummaryCard.tsx: A reusable card component that displays a summary metric with a title, value, icon, optional description, and one of five accent color themes.
frontend/src/data/chatbotKnowledgeBase.j: A JSON knowledge base mapping user query patterns (in English and Hindi) to answer strings and page links for a chatbot assistant.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an InternetIdentityProvider context and useInternetIdentity hook for managing ICP Internet Identity authentication, including login, logout, and identity state tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, scholarships, eligibility checks, auto-fill, and applications.
frontend/src/hooks/useTranslation.ts: A hook that provides translation lookup and language toggling (English/Hindi) with persistence via localStorage.
frontend/src/i18n/translations.ts: Defines English and Hindi translation string maps for all UI sections including navigation, dashboard, scholarships, resume builder, and more.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that sets up Tailwind directives, defines CSS custom properties for light and dark color themes, and adds utility component classes for status indicators.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Entry point that bootstraps the React app with React Query, Internet Identity authentication, and the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/Dashboard.tsx: Main dashboard page showing a hero banner, summary cards (profile completion, active applications, deadlines), quick action buttons, skill gap analysis, and a profile setup modal for new users.
frontend/src/pages/Documents.tsx: Documents management page displaying stats on required vs. uploaded documents and a checklist component for uploading/tracking scholarship-related files.
frontend/src/pages/Help.tsx: Help and FAQ page that renders a searchable accordion of entries sourced from a chatbot knowledge base JSON file.
frontend/src/pages/LoginPage.tsx: Login page with Internet Identity authentication, featuring a feature highlights list, hero banner, and a login button that redirects authenticated users to the dashboard.
frontend/src/pages/MyApplications.tsx: Page listing all of the user's scholarship applications with status badges, linked scholarship details, and a button to browse more scholarships.
frontend/src/pages/Profile.tsx: React page for viewing and editing a user's personal profile (name, email, DOB, gender, category), with profile completion meter and save functionality via backend mutations.
frontend/src/pages/ResumeBuilder.tsx: React page for building a resume by managing academic and career records in tabbed forms, with auto-fill from profile and save to backend.
frontend/src/pages/ScholarshipDetail.tsx: React page showing details of a single scholarship, including eligibility check, document checklist, auto-fill application form, and submission logic.
frontend/src/pages/Scholarships.tsx: React page listing all available scholarships with search and filter controls, rendering each card with an eligibility check.
frontend/src/utils/chatbotMatcher.ts: Utility that matches a user's text query against a knowledge base using exact phrase and word-level scoring, returning the best matching entry above a minimum threshold.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, storing, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, extending the default theme with custom OKLCH-based color tokens, brand colors (saffron, teal), typography, container queries, and animation plugins.
project_state.json: Project state manifest describing the full-stack Scholarship Management & Career Roadmap platform, including architecture notes, existing feature inventory with IDs and requirement references, known issues, and image requirements.
